message:
fix(hook): route gt hook show to rig DB for remote rig-level targets

runHookShow always used findLocalBeadsDir() (CWD-based) regardless of
the target agent. When called from outside the target's rig (e.g. mayor
checking the refinery's hook, this queries whatever DB is local —
typically HQ — missing wisps stored in the rig's database.

Apply the same rig-aware routing that runHook (attach) already uses:
resolve via agentIDToBeadID + beads.ResolveHookDir.

Closes #2651

Co-Authored-By: Jeremy Irish <jeremy@theirish.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)
